creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next Dubai brunch! 💛

We had a memorable and unique brunch @pureskylounge. The brunch was served sharing style rather than a buffet, in a rooftop lounge that’s drenched in glorious sunset hues and cool beats! 🌅Service was amazing too; very attentive staff and I have to say that they are so good in taking photos! 👏🏻

The whole experience was all about slowing down, indulging in a variety of flavors, and simply appreciating life. 🥰 

📍 Pure Sky Lounge, @hiltondubai JBR
🥘 Sunset Brunch package starts at AED 350
🕕 5:30 PM to 9 PM, every Saturday 

Tag your sunset brunch date!
